weather.headline: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
weather.detail: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Cloudy, with a high near 45. Northeast wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
